description_long: This is a digital representation of an infant with medium brown skin, standing upright and barefoot. The infant's body is adorned with a variety of colorful, cartoon-like illustrations and patterns, including green and red figures, faces, and abstract shapes, which are distributed across the torso, limbs, and head. The infant is wearing a white diaper, which is the only visible garment, and the rest of the body is uncovered except for the illustrated designs. The head is round and bald, with some of the illustrations extending onto the scalp. The facial features are soft and childlike, with a neutral expression and slightly parted lips. The overall form is chubby and proportionate to a young child, with short limbs and a rounded belly.
description: A standing infant with brown skin, wearing a white diaper and covered in colorful cartoon-like illustrations across the body and head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the infant's face, chest, and both arms, highlighting the colorful illustrations on the torso and limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with visible illustrations on the side of the head and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, diaper, and backs of the legs, with fewer illustrations and a mostly bare back.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, arm, and leg, with more illustrations visible on the right arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_type: white diaper with no other visible clothing; body covered in colorful cartoon-like illustrations
